name: Rectifier
description: This simple algorithm computes the absolute value of the input voltage.

parameters.name: Channels
parameters.description: The number of bus channels to process.

parameters.name: Enable
parameters.description: Enables the channel. Disabled channels have no effect on the bus.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

output_ports.name: Output
output_ports.description: The output bus. If set to 'None', the input bus is used as output, and the mode is always 'Replace'.

output_ports.name: Output
output_ports.description: The output bus. If set to 'None', the input bus is used as output, and the mode is always 'Replace'.
